---
title: "compile_failure_report.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\new_world_seed\.agents\scripts\compile_failure_report.py"
loc: 36
complexity: 11
logic_score: 1.95
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 1.51
---

## Intent
The `compile_failure_report.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on compile_report. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via compile_report. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [collections](file://collections)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `compile_report`
